hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(generate_pcb/|release_jlcpcb/|footprints|jlcpcb_export|\.kicad_pcb)'; then echo '\n>>> PCB/PCBA file modified — remember to run DFA verification: python3 scripts/verify_dfa.py'; fi
